arts.ttl: Unhappy Arne Slot slams 'unacceptable' Plymouth loss and rejects Liverpool fans' opinion
arts.sum: Some have suggested Liverpool's FA Cup exit at the hands of Plymouth Argyle could come with some positives, but Reds manager Arne Slot doesn't see things the same way

arts.ttl: Liverpool's 'unacceptable' defeat by Plymouth was NOT a blessing in disguise, Arne Slot insists as he prepares for his first Merseyside derby
arts.sum: LEWIS STEELE: The Premier League leaders were shocked on Sunday when Championship strugglers Plymouth pulled off the upset of the fourth round with a 1-0 victory in Devon.

arts.ttl: ‘Absolutely superb’ – Plymouth Argyle hailed by EFL pundit ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle fully ‘deserved’ to beat Liverpool in the FA Cup on Sunday as they gear up to… The post ‘Absolutely superb’ – Plymouth Argyle hailed by EFL pundit ahead of Millwall clash appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: ‘On the up’ – Plymouth Argyle vs Millwall prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Plymouth Argyle vs Millwall prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Wednesday. The post ‘On the up’ – Plymouth Argyle vs Millwall prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Plymouth Argyle bring the magic in the FA Cup - Football Weekly
arts.athr: Presented by Max Rushden with Barry Glendenning, Jonathan Wilson and Troy Townsend. Produced by Joel Grove and our executive producer is Danielle Stephens.
arts.sum: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning, Jonathan Wilson and Troy Townsend as Plymouth Argyle put a stop to Liverpool’s quadruple dreams Rate, review, share on Apple Podcasts, Soundcloud, Audioboom, Mixcloud, Acast and Stitcher, and join the conversation on Facebook, Twitter and email. On the podcast today; Liverpool finally meet a tough opponent as the team bottom of the Championship, Plymouth Argyle, deservedly beat them 1-0 at Home Park to halt Liverpool’s hopes of achieving a quadruple. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'Don't mess with the FA Cup - Plymouth teach Slot a lesson'
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot learns you cannot mess with the FA Cup after an embarrassing defeat at Plymouth, writes chief football writer Phil McNulty.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner delivers verdict on Millwall FA Cup draw
arts.sum: Crystal Palace boss Oliver Glasner said he is fully focused on Crystal Palace’s next Premier League outing despite drawing rivals Millwall in the next round of the FA Cup. “I could feel the excitement in the dressing room from all the staff,” said Glasner, with the cup draw being made before the game at the Keepmoat.

arts.ttl: Palace beat Doncaster to set up FA Cup meeting with Millwall
arts.sum: Goals from Daniel Munoz and Justin Devenny saw Crystal Palace through to the FA Cup fifth round with a 2-0 win at Doncaster.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace win at Doncaster to set up fifth round tie against Millwall
arts.sum: The Eagles avoided an upset to set up a home tie against the Premier League team.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fifth round draw: Plymouth rewarded with huge Man City tie; Man Utd host Fulham
arts.sum: In-form Bournemouth host Wolves at the Vitality Stadium, Aston Villa face Cardiff City at home after beating Tottenham Hotspur, Preston North End take on Burnley, Doncaster or Crystal Palace play Millwall and Exeter or Nottingham Forest, who will contest the final game of the fourth round on Tuesday night, entertain Premier League strugglers Ipswich Town. "It has been agreed that VAR will be utilised for every match in the Fifth Round of the competition through to the Final at Wembley Stadium, and will not be in operation for the Third and Fourth Rounds.
